messages.content:
Create a thrilling “choose your own adventure” game for me to play through. I’ll be picking from choices you give me. Some of them are in my favour and some of them are not. The outcome is only revealed after I make my choice.

I’m Tommy Rollins, the main character of this fighting game (similar to Streets of Rage, Final Fight etc). 

Tommy Rollins: 100 hitpoints, Balanced Fighter

I face the following enemies in their level:

Level: Elite School

Enemies: 
Cocky Jock: 35 Hitpoints, Moves: Tackle, Suplex, Headlock 
Naughty Cheerleader: 25 Hitpoints, Moves: High Flying Kick, Hurricanrana, Headscissors
Flirty Gymnast: 25 Hitpoints, Moves: Spinning Kick, Twirling Shoulder Throw, Bodyscissors

The enemies will attack me at the same time, using various attacks to try and knock me unconscious. My goal is to knock each of them out and make it to the next level.

End every post with several choices for me to pick from, not revealing their outcome to me.

Welcome to the thrilling adventure game of Elite School! You are Tommy Rollins, a balanced fighter with 100 hitpoints, and your goal is to defeat your enemies and advance through the levels. 

You step into the Elite School, a prestigious institution with highly skilled fighters as students. Your first level opponents: Cocky Jock, Naughty Cheerleader, and Flirty Gymnast are already in the gym, waiting for the ultimate showdown. Each of them has their unique set of moves, but they will attack you all at once.

The cocky jock smirks at you, while the naughty cheerleader cracks her knuckles, and the flirty gymnast beams at you, even as she performs a warm-up twist. The battle is about to begin.

A: Aim a high kick at the Cocky Jock.
B: Go for a low sweep to knock the Naughty Cheerleader off balance.
C: Quickly grapple with Flirty Gymnast and attempt a throw.

You decide to aim a high kick at the Cocky Jock, hoping to catch him off guard. As you approach the Jock, he attempts to dodge but isn't fast enough. Your kick connects, and the Jock staggers back, with his hitpoints reduced to 20. However, this leaves you momentarily exposed to the Naughty Cheerleader and the Flirty Gymnast.

The Naughty Cheerleader takes advantage of the situation, landing a High Flying Kick that catches you off-guard. This hit reduces your hitpoints to 85. Meanwhile, the Flirty Gymnast leaps towards you, ready to attack.

Tommy Rollins: 85 hitpoints
Cocky Jock: 20 Hitpoints
Naughty Cheerleader: 25 Hitpoints
Flirty Gymnast: 25 Hitpoints

D: Dodge the Flirty Gymnast and counterattack with a fast punch.
E: Brace for impact, then attempt to pin the Flirty Gymnast to the ground.
F: Perform a rolling evasion to escape from both the Naughty Cheerleader and Flirty Gymnast.

You decide to brace for impact and attempt to pin the Flirty Gymnast as she attacks. As she closes the gap, you catch her in mid-air and use her momentum to throw her to the ground, pinning her underneath you. The Flirty Gymnast loses 10 hitpoints.

However, as you focus on the Flirty Gymnast, the Naughty Cheerleader and Cocky Jock take the opportunity to regroup. The Naughty Cheerleader launches herself at you, managing to land a Hurricanrana while the Cocky Jock recovers his stance.

As a result, you suffer another 10 hitpoints of damage, bringing your total to 75 hitpoints.

Tommy Rollins: 75 hitpoints
Cocky Jock: 20 Hitpoints
Naughty Cheerleader: 25 Hitpoints
Flirty Gymnast: 15 Hitpoints

G: Quickly release the pinned Flirty Gymnast and try to land a double punch on the Naughty Cheerleader and Cocky Jock.
H: Hold on to the Flirty Gymnast, using her as a shield against the incoming attacks from Naughty Cheerleader and Cocky Jock.
I: Yank the Flirty Gymnast off the ground and try to use her as a projectile against the Cocky Jock.

Deciding to use the element of surprise, you yank the Flirty Gymnast off the ground and propel her towards the Cocky Jock. The Flirty Gymnast, caught off guard, slams into the Cocky Jock, causing both to crumble to the ground. The impact causes both Flirty Gymnast and Cocky Jock to lose 10 hitpoints.

Seeing an opportunity, the Naughty Cheerleader moves in to attack you again, but you manage to dodge this time, leaving her momentarily vulnerable.

Tommy Rollins: 75 hitpoints
Cocky Jock: 10 Hitpoints
Naughty Cheerleader: 25 Hitpoints
Flirty Gymnast: 5 Hitpoints

J: Attack the vulnerable Naughty Cheerleader with a powerful punch.
K: Move in for the finishing blow on the Cocky Jock.
L: Attempt a spinning sweep kick aimed at all three opponents.

You spot the weakened Cocky Jock on the ground and choose to capitalize on the opportunity to finish him off. Rushing towards him, you land a powerful punch to his face, causing him to lose consciousness. The Cocky Jock is now knocked out and out of the fight.

As you take care of the Cocky Jock, the Naughty Cheerleader and the Flirty Gymnast regroup, preparing to retaliate. The Flirty Gymnast, despite her low hitpoints, is still determined to fight, while the Naughty Cheerleader looks enraged that her teammate is down.

Tommy Rollins: 75 hitpoints
Cocky Jock: 0 Hitpoints (knocked out)
Naughty Cheerleader: 25 Hitpoints
Flirty Gymnast: 5 Hitpoints

M: Engage in hand-to-hand combat with the Naughty Cheerleader.
N: Try to land a roundhouse kick on the Flirty Gymnast, aiming to finish her off.
O: Backflip away from the two remaining opponents, hoping to find a better position to attack from.

Deciding to engage the Naughty Cheerleader, you move in swiftly, initiating hand-to-hand combat. As you throw a series of punches, she manages to block some, but a couple of strong hits connect, reducing her hitpoints by 15. She retaliates with a few kicks and manages to land one, causing you to lose 5 hitpoints. 

While you are focused on the Naughty Cheerleader, the Flirty Gymnast moves behind you, preparing to execute a stealthy attack.

Tommy Rollins: 70 hitpoints
Cocky Jock: 0 Hitpoints (knocked out)
Naughty Cheerleader: 10 Hitpoints
Flirty Gymnast: 5 Hitpoints

P: Sense the Flirty Gymnast's incoming attacks and counter her with an elbow strike.
Q: Focus solely on finishing off the Naughty Cheerleader.
R: Shove the Naughty Cheerleader towards the Flirty Gymnast, hoping to use her as a shield.

Realizing the Flirty Gymnast is preparing to attack you from behind, you quickly shove the Naughty Cheerleader towards her, hoping to use her as a shield. The Naughty Cheerleader, caught off guard, stumbles forward and gets hit by the Flirty Gymnast's spinning kick meant for you. 

With the impact, both the Naughty Cheerleader and Flirty Gymnast lose 5 hitpoints. The Flirty Gymnast is now knocked out, leaving only the Naughty Cheerleader remaining with 5 hitpoints. 

Tommy Rollins: 70 hitpoints
Cocky Jock: 0 Hitpoints (knocked out)
Naughty Cheerleader: 5 Hitpoints
Flirty Gymnast: 0 Hitpoints (knocked out)

S: Finish off the Naughty Cheerleader with a powerful punch.
T: Try to intimidate the Naughty Cheerleader into submission.
U: Attempt a flashy combo of kicks and punches to knock her out.

With confidence, you decide to attempt a flashy combo of kicks and punches to knock out the Naughty Cheerleader. You start with a quick jab followed by a roundhouse kick, and as she staggers, you finish the combo with an uppercut. The Naughty Cheerleader is unable to defend against your onslaught and tumbles to the ground, knocked out.

Congratulations! You have successfully defeated all your opponents in the Elite School level:

Tommy Rollins: 70 hitpoints
Cocky Jock: 0 Hitpoints (knocked out)
Naughty Cheerleader: 0 Hitpoints (knocked out)
Flirty Gymnast: 0 Hitpoints (knocked out)

As the last opponent falls to the floor, you give yourself a moment to catch your breath. The doors to the next level open, revealing an even more challenging set of opponents. With determination, you advance to face them.

[End of Game] Please restart the game for a new adventure, or choose a different choice for an alternate outcome.
